description: The Galatolo Mafia clan was a criminal family originating from the Acquasanta neighborhood of Palermo, Sicily. One of the longest-running Mafia clans in the city, they held important positions throughout the 20th century and ruled the Resuttana mandamento in the early 21st century. They were involved in the violent Palermo wholesale market war in the 1950s and were devastated by internal betrayal. The clan was active from the 1950s until 2014.

country_links.evidence_quote: were even involved in a large scale drug trafficking operation involving relatives of the Galatolos living in the United States.
country_links.context: The Galatolo clan was involved in a large scale drug trafficking operation involving relatives living in the United States.
